reason: Jayden rejected the north/south/east/west Atlas terrain influence after hard biome and terrain cuts remained visible. The pack should return to normal random Tectonic/Terralith generation and tune structures/roads separately.

active_expectation.overworld_biome_source: No Ascendant Atlas override. Use the normal modded Overworld biome source stack from Terralith/Tectonic and installed datapacks.
active_expectation.continentalness_bias: No Ascendant Atlas atlas_land_bias density-function override.
active_expectation.helper_jar: May remain installed for diagnostics/history, but it must not be referenced by active Overworld dimension or density-function JSON while this policy is disabled.
active_expectation.atlas_runtime: Coordinate scoreboards, world border, docs, reports, and planning data may remain. They are not allowed to steer terrain/biome generation in this mode.

old_world_warning: Existing generated chunks can keep old Atlas-shaped terrain, old biome decisions, and old structure placement. Judge this rollback only in a fresh world or fully ungenerated chunks after syncing the active instance.
